mechanism: EM carry's 40-50% dollar beta and 23% credit beta create direct factor overlap with standard 60/40 portfolio exposures (dollar beta ~0.1-0.3, credit beta ~0.4-0.5), making carry allocation a concentration rather than diversification for USD-based investors.
regime_dependence: Always present for USD-based investors; non-USD investors (JPY, EUR base) may genuinely diversify with carry.
